description: L1 with behavioral description and no date — not strategy
source: When connectivity drops, the app queues writes locally and syncs them to the server on reconnect. Users see a banner indicating offline mode is active.
rationale: Names user-observable behaviors: write queuing, sync on reconnect, offline banner. No date or milestone — this is a behavioral commitment, not a roadmap intent. L1 tiebreaker: behavior named even without a date. Two observable behaviors → two L1 decisions if splitting, or one compound L1.
